title: HTS Testing Cheatsheet (form-dump uia-test do scan chart analyze-hack dbgview)
desc: Operator reference for HTS-specific testing verbs that predate the unified a11y command. Covers form-dump (MFC form structure dump), uia-test (UIA pattern prober), legacy do/scan/dialog-click/dialog/titlebar/toolbar-ocr wrappers, chart analysis, analyze-hack diagnostics, dbgview OutputDebugString tail. Use when automating Korean HTS (Hero4 HeroGlobal xingQ Kiwoom Tuhon).
steps: form-dump WINDOW_TITLE FORM_ID --depth N: prints full MFC form tree including owner-drawn child controls. Use when UIA/MSAA do not expose a control -- form-dump shows the raw CChildWindow hierarchy so you can find the real control id
uia-test GRAP --invoke NAME: probes what UIA patterns and values a target exposes. Use before writing a11y type or set-value to confirm which pattern is available (Value vs LegacyIAccessible vs Text)
do WINDOW_TITLE FORM_ID BUTTON_TEXT --confirm: legacy wrapper for click-by-text on HTS MFC forms. Use when form-id plus button-text is unique. Modern equivalent is a11y invoke with a grap
scan WINDOW_TITLE --save --ocr --detail: OCR-based visual dump of a window. Use for debugging when UIA returns empty. --save writes PNG; --ocr runs Tesseract
click WINDOW_TITLE FORM_ID BUTTON_TEXT --combo N INDEX: combo-aware click for dropdown plus menu sequences on HTS
dialog-click DIALOG_TITLE BUTTON_INDEX: click button by index in a modal dialog. Use for standard OK Cancel Yes No patterns where text varies
titlebar WINDOW_TITLE FORM_ID BUTTON_INDEX --ocr: operates on MFC form titlebar buttons (close min max and custom). --ocr when the button text is a bitmap
toolbar-ocr WINDOW_TITLE --click TEXT --save: OCR on a toolbar region then optional click. Use for HTS toolbars that are one big bitmap image
capture WINDOW_TITLE -o OUTPUT_PNG --form FORM_ID: screenshot a window or specific form. Sibling of screenshot but tuned for HTS form boundaries
chart: chart analysis tool for heroes-specific chart windows. Extracts candle data via Vision. Use only when UIA and clipboard bridge both fail
analyze-hack: diagnostic superset of a11y hack -- runs CCA plus UIA plus OCR plus Gemini Vision and emits a JSON report. Expensive; use once when a control resists normal detection
dbgview: tail OutputDebugString stream from wkappbot-core and HTS. Useful to watch CMD execution guards fire during suggest resolve or to capture MFC TRACE output
Legacy vs modern: prefer a11y subcommands over do scan dialog-click titlebar when a grap expression works. The legacy verbs exist for pre-grap scripts and HTS edge cases only

HTS automation decision tree: UIA reachable -> a11y invoke or a11y set-value. UIA missing but MSAA reachable -> a11y click with Win32 tier. Both missing (owner-drawn grid) -> a11y grid-read for reading or form-dump plus PostMessage WM_COMMAND for writing. Last resort -> chart or analyze-hack
author: claude
